title: Anemia & Gastric Recovery
description: Moringa leaves supply rich levels of non-heme iron and synergistic Vitamin C. Ground Ginger's active gingerols stimulate gastric mucosal circulation, salivary secretions, and intestinal motility, significantly optimizing iron and mineral absorption rates while alleviating gastrointestinal discomfort.
clinicalAdvice: Highly recommended supportive combination. Excellent for treating chronic fatigue and hookworm-induced anemia. Administer dietary Moringa powder concurrently with Ginger root tea infusions.
citation: Journal of Nutritional Biochemistry, 2019; International Journal of Food Sciences, 2021
